EmailTemplate.name: EOI Cancellation Approved - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: EOI Cancellation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!CustomerName},
This is with reference to your "Expression of Interest" cancellation. Kindly note that your EOI cancellation request is approved.
We look forward to serving you soon again. You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
